title: QA Engineer (5.5 Days / Tuas)
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Implement and maintain quality control procedures in accordance with company and customer requirements
  • Conduct incoming, in-process, and final inspections of mechanical parts and assemblies
  • Review and approve inspection reports, route cards, and quality records
  • Handle non-conformance (NCR), corrective and preventive actions (CAPA)
  • Perform root cause analysis and support improvement initiatives
  • Support customer audits, internal audits, and supplier audits
  • Liaise with production, engineering, and suppliers on quality issues
  • Ensure compliance with ISO / customer quality standards and drawings

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Mechanical Engineering or related field
  • Minimum 3 years of experience in Quality Assurance within a manufacturing environment
  • Knowledge of mechanical drawings, GD&T, and inspection tools (e.g. vernier,micrometer, CMM is an advantage)
  • Familiar with quality systems such as ISO 9001 / AS9100 (advantage)
  • Strong problem-solving and communication skills
  • Able to work independently and as part of a team
  • Knowledge of NDT, FAI, PPAP, or customer-specific requirements
  • Audit experience (internal or external)

How to Apply:

Interested applicants, kindly click on “APPLY NOW”

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.
